summary: Hand-built local SQLite store (internal/store) + envelope-aware sibling client (internal/sculptok), and implemented the generate (depthmap/stl/threed/restore + --batch/--restore-first), cost, search, analytics, reconcile, and sync commands.
reason: The generator emits no store/sync for SculptOK's list-only (no get-by-id) async-job API and scaffolds the research.json novel features as TODO stubs; these files implement the approved transcendence manifest and must survive regen.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood PASS (64/0); live depth-map generate end-to-end (upload->submit->poll->download->persist) produced a real 1280x1280 PNG for 10 credits.
